name: Vanilla Nut Kaffe Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease one large bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl, whisk the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla nut coffee and vanilla extract.
5. Set aside.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
7. Blend the flour mixture into the butter mixture with sour cream until well combined.
8. In a small bowl, mix the brown sugar, toasted hazelnuts, and nutmeg.
9. Spread 3/4 of the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Sprinkle half of the hazelnut mixture over the batter.
11. Pour in the remaining batter.
12. Top with the remaining hazelnut mixture.
13. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
14. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove from the pan and place on a wire rack to cool completely.
Coffee Glaze:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together powdered sugar, vanilla nut coffee (double), half and half, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Drizzle the glaze over the warm cake and let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
3. Dust with additional powdered sugar and finely ground nutmeg just before serving.
